title: MiniMax M2.7 Model Release and Features
key_points: MiniMax M2.7 is an enhanced version of the M2.5 model, designed for agentic harnesses and complex use cases in reasoning, ML research, software, engineering, and office work.
It is released with open weights via NVIDIA and the open source inference ecosystem.
The MiniMax M2 series uses a sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) design, balancing efficiency with a 230B-parameter model's full capacity and low inference costs.
Key architectural features include multi-head causal self-attention with Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE) and Query-Key Root Mean Square Normalization (QK RMSNorm).
A top-k expert routing mechanism further optimizes inference costs by activating only relevant experts.
The architecture is optimized for coding challenges and complex agentic tasks.
